lint.command: set -a; [ -f ./.env ] && . ./.env; set +a; cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --bin toggl -- -D warnings

blockingIssues.description: The public resource tree exposes `organization` instead of the mission-defined canonical `org`, so the command surface does not match the shared-state contract.
Parser coverage hard-codes `toggl organization ...` instead of validating the canonical `toggl org ...` command path.
Missing-argument failures for `entry show`, `entry delete`, and `entry bulk-edit` print to stderr but return success, violating the non-zero fatal error contract.
Parser-only missing-argument flows create the authenticated API client before failing, so they can touch credential storage instead of staying keychain-free.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen the cli-worker procedure so workers must explicitly compare the assigned feature against the actual commit/diff and verify any required shared-state reads before claiming a feature is already implemented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The foundation-local-env-and-output-contract worker reported no code changes were needed even though the reviewed commit only contained the clap/resource-tree migration. A separate review also noted the transcript did not show the expected pre-edit read of repo .factory/library guidance.
